markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content workflow, quality, and production scale.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** Google Docs will be delivered Tuesdays for review, with JSON files following on Thursdays. This gives Metronome more time for the critical review phase.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Quality Control:** Metronome's review time is high due to inconsistent templates and inaccurate data. GrowthX is implementing new checks to fix these issues and reduce the review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Production Scale:** Production will increase to 6 articles/week, contingent on quality improving. If review time doesn't decrease, the rate will be capped at 5.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Tone & Categorization:** Content analysis sections must be objective ("what it is"), reserving opinion for the "Metronome's Take." A new categorization system is in development to provide consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Review Process

  - [**Problem:** Metronome's review time is excessive because articles often deviate from the agreed-upon template and contain inaccurate data.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**Example:** The 11 Labs page incorrectly split a single product into two pages (consumer/API) despite its unified pricing model.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will implement new checks to ensure:](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Singular articles are not split into multiple pages.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Subheaders are included in Google Docs to eliminate manual additions.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [JSON conversion is accurate to prevent data mismatches.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### New Workflow & Schedule

  - [**Rationale:** To give Metronome more time for the critical review phase, the delivery schedule is being split.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**New Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**Tuesdays:** New Google Docs for review.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**Thursdays:** JSON files for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**This Week's Exception:** The 10 articles from the previous batch will be prioritized for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Wed, EOD:** 10 JSON files delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Thurs, EOD:** New batch of Google Docs delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Production Scaling

  - [**Plan:** Increase production from 5 to 6 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Contingency:** The 6-article rate is dependent on quality improvements. If review time remains high, the rate will be capped at 5.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:** Reviews are due Friday EOD or Monday AM.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Tone & Categorization

  - [**Tone:** Analysis sections must be objective ("what it is"), reserving opinion for the "Metronome's Take." This corrects the AI's tendency for overly promotional language.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Categorization:** A new system is needed to provide consistency across articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The system must account for product nuance (e.g., API vs. consumer) and varied pricing models.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [**Status:** Will is developing a spreadsheet to define categories and will share it with GrowthX for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Deliver 10 JSON files by Wed, EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Deliver new Google Docs by Thurs, EOD.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [Notify Metronome via Slack when docs are ready.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Update calendar invites for the bi-weekly meeting cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [**Metronome:**](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Review new Google Docs by Fri, EOD or Mon, AM.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
      - [Notify GrowthX via Slack after publishing JSON files.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [Share the categorization spreadsheet with GrowthX for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/_T2SKdVKb_7PNaZNkkgj1Y4HL49Hisd1?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
